chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 900 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «يُجْزِي فِي اَلسَّفَرِ إِقَامَةٌ بِغَيْرِ أَذَانٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.900 - Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that He said:
"In travel, the iqamah (second call to prayer) suffices without the adhan (call to prayer)."
